public_reputation: Known locally through day-to-day work as hostler.
manner: Carries the habits of a place-bound worker whose judgment comes from repetition rather than theory. In Shelk, that reads as someone polished, socially alert, and attentive to harmony, status, and cultural presentation, and the habits of a hostler still shape how they handle timing, silence, and attention.
daily_function: Performs the ongoing duties of hostler in and around Shelkopolis Public Library, where the role has practical consequences even when nothing dramatic is happening.
current_agenda: Keep Shelkopolis Public Library workable through the obligations of hostler while managing the immediate pressure of institutional scrutiny in Shelk.
hidden_pressure: Must hold local credibility together even when the causes of strain sit elsewhere. Around Shelkopolis Public Library, that usually means carrying institutional scrutiny, reputation risk, daily strain without letting the role of hostler visibly slip.

adventure_hooks.summary: Velis Petalglass needs help with a problem in Shelkopolis Public Library that larger systems have pushed down onto ordinary hands.
Getting involved with Velis Petalglass can expose the party to the everyday consequences of pressure that others only discuss in the abstract.

what_they_want_from_strangers: Useful clarity, respect for Hostler, and proof that strangers will not create avoidable noise in Principality of Shelk.
